descriptions.text: Bartolomeu Odyssey is a side scroller based on the tellings of the flying priest, Bartolomeu de Gusmão, in which you need to dodge the birds, vultures, and other dangers that dominate the skies of this reality.
Bartolomeu de Gusmão is crossing the horizons, from Lisbon to the ends of space, in his legendary flying boat, the Passarola.
